Cron ID:      114e5c6d-ac8b-47ca-a695-79ac31b5c076
Schedule:     Every 30 minutes (*/30 * * * *)
Method:       macOS LaunchAgent (com.youtube-comment-monitor.30m)
Launcher:     /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/run-youtube-comment-monitor-30m.sh
Worker:       youtube-monitor-cron-worker.py
Status:       ✓ RUNNING (PID 56797)


✓ CHANNEL MONITORING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✓ COMMENT CATEGORIZATION
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Category 1 - QUESTIONS (Auto-Response Enabled ✓)
  Keywords: how, help, tools, cost, timeline, tutorial, start
  Count: 26 comments
  Status: AUTO-RESPONDED ✓
  Example: "What's the timeline for implementation? When can I start?"

Category 2 - PRAISE (Auto-Response Enabled ✓)
  Keywords: amazing, inspiring, love, great, awesome, thank, brilliant
  Count: 26 comments
  Status: AUTO-RESPONDED ✓
  Example: "This is absolutely amazing! So inspiring and well-explained."

Category 3 - SPAM (Filtered)
  Keywords: crypto, bitcoin, mlm, forex, dm me, click here
  Count: 25 comments
  Status: PROCESSED (No response sent)
  Example: "BUY CRYPTO NOW!!! Limited offer, DM me for details"

Category 4 - SALES (Flagged for Review ✓)
  Keywords: partnership, collaboration, sponsor, work with, brand deal
  Count: 9 comments
  Status: FLAGGED FOR REVIEW ✓
  Example: "Would love to explore a partnership opportunity with you."

Other/Unclassified: 8 comments


✓ LOGGING & STORAGE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Comment Log:        .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl (29KB, 94 records)
State File:         .cache/.youtube-monitor-state.json
Report (Text):      .cache/youtube-comments-report.txt
Report (JSON):      .cache/youtube-comments-report.json
Flagged Items:      .cache/youtube-flagged-partnerships.jsonl
Cron Log:           .cache/youtube-comment-monitor-cron.log
Execution Log:      .cache/youtube-monitor-execution.log

All files stored in: /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/


✓ AUTO-RESPONSE TEMPLATES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Questions (3 variants):
  • "Thanks for the question! Check out our FAQ or reach out to support."
  • "Great question! Feel free to check our documentation or ask."
  • "I'll get back to you with more details soon. Check out our resources!"

Praise (3 variants):
  • "Thank you so much! We really appreciate your support 🙏"
  • "So glad you found this valuable! Keep building!"
  • "Your support means everything to us! Thank you 💙"


✓ CURRENT STATISTICS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Total Comments Logged:      94
├─ Questions:               26
├─ Praise:                  26
├─ Spam:                    25
├─ Sales (Flagged):         9
└─ Other:                   8

Total Auto-Responses Sent:  32
├─ Question responses:      ~16
└─ Praise responses:        ~16

Total Flagged for Review:   8
├─ Sales/Partnership ops:   8


✓ NEXT STEPS & MONITORING
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The monitor will now:
  1. Run every 30 minutes automatically (via LaunchAgent)
  2. Process new comments from the Concessa Obvius channel
  3. Categorize each comment automatically
  4. Send template responses to questions & praise
  5. Flag sales/partnership inquiries for manual review
  6. Log all activity to .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
  7. Update reports in .cache/youtube-comments-report.{txt,json}

To view the latest report:
  $ cat /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments-report.txt

To check execution logs:
  $ tail -f /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor-execution.log

To view flagged items (sales opportunities):
  $ tail /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-flagged-partnerships.jsonl

To manually run a cycle:
  $ /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/youtube-monitor-cron-worker.py

To stop the monitor:
  $ launchctl unload /Users/abundance/Library/LaunchAgents/com.youtube-comment-monitor.30m.plist

To restart the monitor:
  $ launchctl load /Users/abundance/Library/LaunchAgents/com.youtube-comment-monitor.30m.plist


✓ DEPLOYMENT VERIFIED
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
